## Summary

- Describe the user-visible or operational change.
- Mention the main slices touched (`web`, `application`, `domain`, `infrastructure`, `mapping`).

## Validation

- [ ] `mvn verify`
- [ ] OpenAPI updated when HTTP behavior changed
- [ ] Flyway migration added when schema changed
- [ ] Logs remain structured and free of sensitive data
- [ ] Documentation updated when onboarding or runtime behavior changed

## Notes

- Mention risks, trade-offs, follow-up work or rollout details.
